About UNOC

Uganda's State Oil Company

Established in 2015, UNOC is mandated to hold and manage the Government of Uganda's interests in petroleum exploration, development and production — and to build Ugandan capacity in the oil and gas sector.

🏛️

State Participation

Holds the State's 15% participating interests in Tilenga and Kingfisher production areas on behalf of the Government of Uganda.

🇺🇬

Local Content Champion

Committed to maximising Ugandan participation — over 80% local employment target across all petroleum operations.

📊

Transparency & Governance

EITI compliant and ISO-certified, with full public disclosure of revenue accounts and annual sustainability reporting.

Learn More About UNOC →

EACOP Pipeline Surpasses 68% Construction Milestone Ahead of Schedule
The East African Crude Oil Pipeline has passed a major construction milestone with welding and pipe-laying operations advancing faster than the original project schedule projected for this quarter.
